title: Tanzania Food, Drugs and Cosmetics (Appointment of Analysts) Notice, 2016
title_en: Tanzania Food, Drugs and Cosmetics (Appointment of Analysts) Notice, 2016

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Order may be cited as the Tanzania Food, Drugs and Cosmetics (appointment of analysts) notice, 2016

provisions.title: Appointment of analysts
provisions.content: The persons whose names appear in the Schedule to this Notice are hereby appointed to be Analysts. A: Food analysis S/N Name Qualification Working station 1. Neema Mwakalinga Laboratory Assistant TFDA Box 77150 Dar es salaam B: Drugs analysis S/N Name Qualification Working station 1. Daniel Mwangoka Laboratory Assistant TFDA Box 77150 Dar es salaam C: Medical devices analysis S/N Name Qualification Working station 1. Dr. Danstan Hipolite Pharmacist TFDA Box 77150 Dar es salaam 2. Geovin Mugoyela Pharmacist TFDA Box 77150 Dar es salaam History of this document 23 September 2016 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania Commenced 06 September 2016 Assented to Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
